tools.name: search
tools.description: Searches canonical Arabic and English Taxi Rido product documentation and original operating guides. Use this before fetch for questions about choosing taxi software, dispatch, taxi app architecture, fleets, access, driver or customer apps, pricing, payments, and operations.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Returns one complete canonical public product page or guide by the stable ID or URL returned from search. The URL can be used as the citation source.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
